output:
The most likely place Dean would look for the navigation charts is **the captain's cabin**.

Here's why: All three crew members were established as knowing the location of all crucial items on board. The last movement of the charts in the story was when Alex relocated them back to the captain's cabin at twilight. Dean was in the galley at that time (reading his cookbook), and then later moved provisions to the galley — there's no indication he witnessed Alex moving the charts back.

However, since Dean has general knowledge of where things belong on the ship, and the cabin is the charts' default/home location (and also where they ended up), **the captain's cabin** is where he'd look first.
